001package entityClasses;
002
003import java.util.ArrayList;
004import java.util.List;
005
006import applicationMain.ValidationUtil;
007
008public class PostList {
009
010        private final List<Post> allPosts;
011        private List<Post> subsetPosts;
012
013        public PostList() {
014                this.allPosts = new ArrayList<Post>();
015                this.subsetPosts = new ArrayList<Post>();
016        }
017
018        public String createPost(Post post) {
019                if (post == null) {
020                        return "Post is required.";
021                }
022
023                String error = validatePost(post);
024                if (error != null) {
025                        return error;
026                }
027
028                if (readPostById(post.getPostId()) != null) {
029                        return "Post ID already exists.";
030                }
031
032                allPosts.add(post);
033                return null;
034        }
035
036        public Post readPostById(int postId) {
037                for (Post post : allPosts) {
038                        if (post.getPostId() == postId) {
039                                return post;
040                        }
041                }
042                return null;
043        }
044
045        public List<Post> readAllPosts() {
046                return new ArrayList<Post>(allPosts);
047        }
048
049        public List<Post> readSubsetPosts() {
050                return new ArrayList<Post>(subsetPosts);
051        }
052
053        public String updatePost(int postId, String newTitle, String newBody, String newCourseTag, boolean newResolved) {
054                Post existing = readPostById(postId);
055                if (existing == null) {
056                        return "Post not found for update.";
057                }
058
059                String titleError = ValidationUtil.validatePostTitle(newTitle);
060                if (titleError != null) {
061                        return titleError;
062                }
063
064                String bodyError = ValidationUtil.validatePostBody(newBody);
065                if (bodyError != null) {
066                        return bodyError;
067                }
068
069                String courseTagError = ValidationUtil.validateCourseTag(newCourseTag);
070                if (courseTagError != null) {
071                        return courseTagError;
072                }
073
074                existing.setTitle(newTitle.trim());
075                existing.setBody(newBody.trim());
076                existing.setCourseTag(newCourseTag.trim());
077                existing.setResolved(newResolved);
078                return null;
079        }
080
081        public boolean deletePost(int postId) {
082                Post existing = readPostById(postId);
083                if (existing == null) {
084                        return false;
085                }
086
087                allPosts.remove(existing);
088                subsetPosts.remove(existing);
089                return true;
090        }
091
092        public void setSubsetFromCourseTag(String courseTag) {
093                subsetPosts = new ArrayList<Post>();
094                for (Post post : allPosts) {
095                        if (post.getCourseTag().equalsIgnoreCase(courseTag)) {
096                                subsetPosts.add(post);
097                        }
098                }
099        }
100
101        public void setSubsetFromKeyword(String keyword) {
102                subsetPosts = new ArrayList<Post>();
103                if (keyword == null || keyword.trim().isEmpty()) {
104                        return;
105                }
106
107                String lowerKeyword = keyword.toLowerCase();
108                for (Post post : allPosts) {
109                        String title = post.getTitle() == null ? "" : post.getTitle().toLowerCase();
110                        String body = post.getBody() == null ? "" : post.getBody().toLowerCase();
111                        if (title.contains(lowerKeyword) || body.contains(lowerKeyword)) {
112                                subsetPosts.add(post);
113                        }
114                }
115        }
116
117        public void clearSubset() {
118                subsetPosts = new ArrayList<Post>();
119        }
120
121        private String validatePost(Post post) {
122                String postIdError = ValidationUtil.validatePostId(post.getPostId());
123                if (postIdError != null) {
124                        return postIdError;
125                }
126
127                String titleError = ValidationUtil.validatePostTitle(post.getTitle());
128                if (titleError != null) {
129                        return titleError;
130                }
131
132                String bodyError = ValidationUtil.validatePostBody(post.getBody());
133                if (bodyError != null) {
134                        return bodyError;
135                }
136
137                String courseTagError = ValidationUtil.validateCourseTag(post.getCourseTag());
138                if (courseTagError != null) {
139                        return courseTagError;
140                }
141
142                String authorError = ValidationUtil.validateAsuUserId(post.getAuthorAsuUserId());
143                if (authorError != null) {
144                        return "Post author: " + authorError;
145                }
146
147                return null;
148        }
149}
